user.title: Petkit Feeder Local
user.description: Fully local integration — the feeder auto-registers on first heartbeat. Just confirm.

init.title: Edit feeding schedule

add_fountain.title: Add water fountain
add_fountain.description: How would you like to authenticate to your Petkit account? Once authenticated, the integration fetches the fountain's identifiers via the Petkit cloud and then runs fully locally.

menu_options.fountain_login: Sign in with email and password
menu_options.fountain_token: Paste a session token (Apple/Google sign-in users)

fountain_login.title: Sign in to Petkit
fountain_login.description: We will call /user/login once to obtain a session token. The token is stored locally and refreshed daily. Your password is never stored — only its MD5 hash is sent (as required by the Petkit API).

fountain_token.title: Paste session token
fountain_token.description: If you signed in to the Petkit app via Apple, Google or WeChat, you don't have a password we can use. Capture your X-Session token once (e.g. via mitmproxy / HTTP Catcher) and paste it here. The token is stored locally and refreshed daily.

fountain_manual.title: Manual fountain entry (advanced)
fountain_manual.description: Enter id, MAC, secret and serial number directly. Only do this if you already have those values from a prior packet capture; for normal users the Sign in or Paste-token paths are easier.

fountain_select.title: Add fountain

data.name: Name (you can change this anytime in HA)

add.title: Add entry

abort.invalid_schedule: Schedule is invalid (e.g. more than 10 entries per day). Nothing saved.
abort.ctw3_not_available: Water fountain extension is not available in this installation.

error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address (need 12 hex chars, e.g. aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff).
error.invalid_device_id: Device ID must be a positive integer.
error.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
error.invalid_auth: Petkit rejected the login. Check email and password.
error.cloud_unreachable: Could not reach the Petkit cloud. Check your internet connection.
error.no_session_returned: Petkit accepted the login but did not return a session token. Try again.
error.invalid_token_length: Token looks wrong (expected 32-128 chars). Check that you copied the entire X-Session header value.
error.invalid_token: Petkit rejected the token. It may have expired — please capture a fresh one.
error.session_lost: The session was lost mid-flow. Please start over.
error.fountain_lookup_failed: The Petkit cloud rejected the lookup. Check that MAC and serial number match a fountain on your account.
error.fountain_no_secret: The Petkit cloud returned a result but no secret. This usually means the fountain is not bound to your account.

set_schedule.name: Set feeding schedule
set_schedule.description: Replaces the complete feeding schedule on the feeder. Persisted across HA restarts. Max 10 entries per weekday.

entries.name: Entries
entries.description: List of feeding times — each with time (HH:MM), amount (grams, 1-200), optional days and name.

clear_schedule.name: Clear feeding schedule
clear_schedule.description: Removes all entries from the feeding schedule.

feed.name: Feed manually
feed.description: Dispenses a portion of food on the next heartbeat.

reset_desiccant.name: Reset desiccant
reset_desiccant.description: Resets the desiccant counter after replacing the silica gel pack.
